props.ChoiceText: You completed a binding that left the room quieter, tighter, and much harder to trust.
props.ChoiceBio: A completed binding taught you that successful restraint can be more unsettling than failure.

0.TransitionText: Because a completed binding taught you that successful restraint can be more unsettling than failure, you went further into occult work rather than away from it.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because a completed binding taught you that successful restraint can be more unsettling than failure, controlled experiment and hidden process led naturally toward alchemy.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Alchemist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because a completed binding taught you that successful restraint can be more unsettling than failure, success also cost you enough to drag you toward hardship.
